parameters.content:
## SBS Sendmails (single webhook)

• **Pinned sheet:** Send Emails TOT (`1sUUpVcRs5tE1KzNGaVA4cnQShvr1eI1bvkO44jAsKtI`).
• **One webhook** receives: action (preview, status, send, stop) plus optional sheetUrl override.
• **action = preview**: returns sheet columns + sample row.
• **action = status**: returns sent/pending progress.
• **action = send**: responds immediately then reads sheet and sends emails (with subject and bodyHtml).
• **action = stop**: requests the active send loop to stop before the next email.
• Use in Body and Subject: **{{Name}}**, **{{Email}}**, **{{Coures}}**, etc.
